scripts.dev: yarn workspace @tts/api dev & yarn workspace @tts/web dev
scripts.build: yarn workspace @tts/config build && yarn workspace @tts/sdk build && yarn workspace @tts/api build && yarn workspace @tts/web build
scripts.test: yarn workspace @tts/api test && yarn workspace @tts/config test
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @tts/api typecheck && yarn workspace @tts/web typecheck && yarn workspace @tts/config typecheck && yarn workspace @tts/sdk typecheck
